description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on workflow dispatch, push to main, and push to tags matching v*. The workflow has multiple jobs for different environments and build configurations, including format verification, Linux x86_64 and arm64 builds with various optimizations, Windows x86_64 builds, and GPU builds with CUDA and ROCm support. Each job checks out the code, sets up the environment, and runs custom build and test scripts.
